/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/circular_queue_unittest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/circular_queue_unittest.dir/circular_queue_unittest.cc.o CMakeFiles/circular_queue_unittest.dir/__/__/main/common/circular_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/circular_queue_unittest.dir/circular_queue_unittest_gen/settings_generated.c.o -o circular_queue_unittest  ../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a
